userMessage: Add frequency and amplitude measurements on CH1 and query both results

response.text: ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Added FREQUENCY, AMPLITUDE measurements on CH1.","findings":[],"suggestedFixes":[],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"CH1 Measurements","description":"Add FREQUENCY, AMPLITUDE measurements on CH1","backend":"pyvisa","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"id":"1","type":"connect","label":"Connect to scope","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true}},{"id":"g1","type":"group","label":"Add CH1 measurements","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"2","type":"write","label":"Add frequency measurement","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS FREQUENCY"}},{"id":"3","type":"write","label":"Set measurement 1 source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:SOUrce1 CH1"}},{"id":"4","type":"write","label":"Add amplitude measurement","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:ADDMEAS AMPLITUDE"}},{"id":"5","type":"write","label":"Set measurement 2 source to CH1","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:SOUrce1 CH1"}}]},{"id":"g2","type":"group","label":"Read measurement results","params":{},"collapsed":false,"children":[{"id":"q1","type":"query","label":"Query frequency result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS1:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_frequency"}},{"id":"q2","type":"query","label":"Query amplitude result","params":{"command":"MEASUrement:MEAS2:RESUlts:CURRentacq:MEAN?","saveAs":"ch1_amplitude"}}]},{"id":"99","type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{}}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Added FREQUENCY, AMPLITUDE measurements on CH1.
